passive.name: Void Stone
passive.description: Kassadin takes reduced magic damage and ignores unit collision.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Kassadin''' is permanently {{tip|ghosted}} and takes reduced {{tip|magic damage|{{as|magic damage}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Kassadin''' is permanently {{tip|ghosted}} and takes 10% reduced {{tip|magic damage|{{as|magic damage}}}}.

Q.name: Null Sphere
Q.description: Kassadin fires an orb of void energy at a target, dealing damage and interrupting channels. The excess energy forms around himself, granting a temporary shield that absorbs magic damage.
Q.tooltip: Kassadin fires an orb of void energy, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and interrupting channels. Kassadin also gains {{ totalshield }} Magic Shield for 1.5 seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Kassadin}} fires an orb of void energy at the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|disrupt|disrupts}} their ongoing {{tip|channel|channels}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He then gains a brief {{tip|shield}} that absorbs {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kassadin''' fires an orb of void energy at the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|disrupt|disrupts}} their ongoing {{tip|channel|channels}}.
wiki_detail.description2: He also gains a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs {{as|magic damage}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The {{tip|disrupt}} is 'wrapped' into a status effect that says the target is {{tip|Silence|Silenced}} for {{fd|0.25}} seconds, but it does not actually ''silence''. It however makes sure that the ''disrupt'' is prevented by {{tip|Cc-immune|immunity to silences}}.
* The shield is granted at the start of the cast time.

W.name: Nether Blade
W.description: Passive: Kassadin's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage. Active: Kassadin's next basic attack deals significant bonus magic damage and restores Mana.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Kassadin's Attacks deal an additional {{ onhitdamage }} magic damage.

Active: Kassadin charges his blade, causing his next Attack to deal {{ activedamage }} magic damage and restore {{ missingmanaratio }}% missing Mana, increased to {{ championmissingmanaratio }}% against champions.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kassadin''' empowers his blade, causing his next basic attack within a few seconds to gain {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}}, deal increased {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}, and restore {{as|{{sti|mana}}}}, with the restoration amount quintupled against {{tip|champion|champions}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Kassadin's''' [[basic attack]]s deal {{as|20|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 10% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} {{tip|on-hit}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kassadin''' empowers his next basic attack within 5 seconds to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, gain {{sti|range|50 '''bonus''' range}}, deal increased {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}, and restore {{as|{{sti|mana}}}}, with the restoration amount quintupled against {{tip|champion|champions}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Increased Bonus Magic Damage|{{ap|50 to 150}} {{as|(+ 80% AP)}}}}
{{st|Mana Restored|{{as|{{ap|4 to 6}}% of '''missing''' mana}}|Mana Restored Against Champions|{{as|{{ap|4*5 to 6*5}}% of '''missing''' mana}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Nether Blade {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Kassadin's''' basic attack timer.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The passive damage applies {{tip|proc damage}} and the active damage applies {{tip|spell damage}}.
* The enhanced attack will apply other [[on-hit effect]]s and can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} as normal.
* ''Nether Blade'' will not grant mana if the attack is {{tip|dodge|dodged}} or if it {{tip|blind|misses}}, but will do so if the attack is {{tip|block|blocked}}. In all cases the damage is parried.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the ''active'' damage but not the ''passive'' one.
* The passive '''bonus''' damage applies to structures.
* The empowered attack will trigger but not be consumed nor apply its effects against [[structures]].

E.name: Force Pulse
E.description: Kassadin draws energy from spells cast in his vicinity. Upon charging up, Kassadin can use Force Pulse to damage and slow enemies in a cone in front of him.
E.tooltip:
Passive: Force Pulse's Cooldown is reduced by {{ reductionperspellcast }} second whenever any Ability is used near Kassadin.

Active: Kassadin unleashes a void pulse, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and Slowing by {{ e2 }}% for {{ e3 }} second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} Ability casts reduce the cooldown of this ability.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kassadin''' emits a pulse of void energy in a cone in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies and briefly {{tip|slow|slows}} them.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} Each time '''Kassadin''' or a nearby {{tip|champion}} casts an [[champion ability|ability]], ''Force Pulse's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is reduced by {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kassadin''' emits a pulse of void energy in a cone in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} them for 1 second.

R.name: Riftwalk
R.description: Kassadin teleports to a nearby location dealing damage to nearby enemy units. Multiple Riftwalks in a short period of time cost additional Mana but also deal additional damage.
R.tooltip:
Kassadin teleports to a nearby location, dealing {{ basedamage }} magic damage.

Each subsequent use of this Ability within the next {{ rstackduration }} seconds doubles the Mana cost and deals an additional {{ bonusdamage }} magic damage. The cost and damage increases can stack up to {{ maxstacks }} times.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kassadin''' {{tip|blinks}} toward the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all nearby enemies upon arrival. He then gains a stack of ''Riftwalk'', stacking up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Riftwalk:}} For each stack, ''Riftwalk'' gains '''bonus''' damage and increased {{as|{{sti|mana}} cost}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kassadin''' {{tip|blinks}} toward the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all nearby enemies upon arrival. He then gains a stack of ''Riftwalk'' for 15 seconds, refreshing on subsequent casts and stacking up to 4 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Riftwalk:}} For each stack, ''Riftwalk'' deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} at an increased {{as|{{sti|mana}} cost}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Bonus Damage Per Stack|{{ap|35 to 55}} {{as|(+ 10% AP)}} {{as|(+ 1% '''maximum''' mana)}}|Maximum Bonus Damage|{{ap|35*4 to 55*4}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}} {{as|(+ 4% '''maximum''' mana)}}|Maximum Magic Damage|{{ap|70+35*4 to 110+55*4}} {{as|(+ {{ap|50+10*4}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ 6% '''maximum''' mana)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Riftwalk will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes: * {{si|Flash}} can be used during the cast time, allowing '''Kassadin''' to blink further away.
